Member-only story

Run These 6 Prompts First…
Save these. Run these. Before you hit deploy.

6 min read
Just now

--

Okay so I need to say something that nobody in the vibe coding community wants to hear.
The AI that built your app was optimizing for one thing i.e. making it work. That’s it. Not making it safe. Not making it secure. Not thinking about what happens when someone with bad intentions finds your login page at 2am.
Those are two completely different goals and the AI only cared about one of them.
There was a vibe coded app that exposed tens of thousands of users’ personal data. The developer shipped it in a weekend. The app looked completely done — clean UI, working features, everything. Wide open database. Anyone could read and write to it. Because the AI scaffolded it that way during development and nobody checked before going live.
This happens more than you think.
It’s just not always this public.
So before you launch, here are 6 prompts.
Copy them and run them. Each one takes about 2 minutes and any one of them could save you from a very bad morning.
Prompt 1 — Rate Limiting
